source_occurrences.title_en: Sri Lankan Food Beyond Curry (Multicultural History)
source_occurrences.sentence: So, if I were talking with someone from Sri Lanka, I’d love to ask: 'If I visit Sri Lanka one day, what are the three dishes I absolutely must try?'
